---
title: "Mary E., Palgrave"
---

## Mary E., Palgrave

### Description

novelist and historian, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1895-9)

### Biography

She might be the Mary Elizabeth Palgrave (b. 1858), daughter of Sir Reginald Palgrave, who married (1903) Augustus Crowder.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
